content.query:
-- Surveys Table
CREATE TABLE ODS.Test_GQ_Surveys (
    SurveyID INT ,
    ContactID INT,
    ProjectID INT ,
    CompanyID INT,
    CompanyName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    CustomCompanyId VARCHAR(255),
    Template VARCHAR(100),
    EndedAt DATETIME2,
    CreatedAt DATETIME2,
    UpdatedAt DATETIME2,
    SendAt DATETIME2,
    CompletionMode VARCHAR(50),
    LastResponseMethod VARCHAR(50),
    LastActivityAt DATETIME2,
    Status VARCHAR(50),
    SurveyTakeUrl varchar(4096)
);

-- Contacts Table
CREATE TABLE ODS.Test_GQ_Contacts (
    ContactID INT ,
    Name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    Email1 VARCHAR(255),
    Email2 VARCHAR(255),
    Phone1 VARCHAR(20),
    Phone2 VARCHAR(20),
    CreatedAt DATETIME2,
    UpdatedAt DATETIME2
);

-- Projects Table
CREATE TABLE ODS.Test_GQ_Projects (
    ProjectID INT ,
    ContactID INT ,
    Address VARCHAR(255),
    City VARCHAR(100),
    State VARCHAR(100),
    Zip VARCHAR(20),
    LeadDate DATE,
    StartDate DATE,
    EndDate DATE,
    CreatedAt DATETIME2,
    UpdatedAt DATETIME2,
    ExternalID VARCHAR(255),
    Value DECIMAL(18,2),
    Notes Varchar(4096)
);

-- CustomFilters Table (Merged with CustomFilterValues)
CREATE TABLE ODS.Test_GQ_CustomFilters (
    FilterID INT IDENTITY(1,1) ,
    ProjectID INT ,
    FilterType VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    Value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

-- Questions Table
CREATE TABLE ODS.Test_GQ_Questions (
    QuestionID INT IDENTITY(1,1) ,
    SurveyID INT ,
    [Order] INT,
    Name VARCHAR(255),
    Type VARCHAR(50),
    Rating VARCHAR(20),
    RatingScale VARCHAR(20),
    Comment Varchar(4096),
    Published BIT
);
